title: WatchResponse
description: A streaming response from the watch endpoint

watch_id.description: ID of the watch that generated this response

created.description: True if this response confirms the creation of a new watch

canceled.description: True if this response confirms the cancellation of a watch

compact_revision.description: Set when a watch is canceled because the requested start revision has been compacted

fragment.description: True if this is a fragment of a larger watch response

events.description: List of events in this watch response
